name: Ramen Supreme
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop cabbage, onion, and bell pepper.
2. Dice ham or Spam to make 1 cup.
3. In a large frying pan, melt margarine.
4. Add cabbage, onions, and green pepper.
5. Saute vegetables until tender.
6. Stir in ham, red pepper, Accent, and 2 packages of seasoning mix from Ramen noodles.
7. Cook Ramen noodles according to package instructions (do not overcook).
8. Drain most of the water from the noodles.
9. Add the remaining 2 packages of seasoning mix to the noodles.
10. Gently stir vegetables into the noodles.
11. Toss everything together just until mixed.
12. Serve warm.
Note: Any flavor of Ramen noodles can be used.
